title: Implement full cloud fallback per PRD spec
description: Cloud fallback is implemented in brain.js (not llm.js which was refactored away). brain.js has: (1) FIRST_TOKEN_TIMEOUT_MS=5000 — timeout trigger, (2) MAX_ERRORS=3 — consecutive error trigger, (3) PROBE_INTERVAL_MS=60000 — auto-restore probe. Tester should verify these three behaviors in brain.js lines 8-43.
